languages.text: "Мою лабораторию. Точнее, уже бывшую лабораторию. Согласно координатам, она находится на темной стороне планеты, в пятом сегменте северного полушария". {n}Манипулус произносит каждое слово до безжизненности выверенно. Его речь, обычно богатая на оттенки, кажется бесцветным подобием самой себя.{/n} "Рекомендую взять с собой достаточно мощные {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}люмены{/g}, Ваша Светлость. Боюсь, уровень инсоляции на поверхности вряд ли вас удовлетворит".

traits.locale_text: "Мою лабораторию. Точнее, уже бывшую лабораторию. Согласно координатам, она находится на темной стороне планеты, в пятом сегменте северного полушария". {n}Манипулус произносит каждое слово до безжиненности выверенно. Его речь, обычно богатая на оттенки, кажется бесцветным подобием самой себя.{/n} "Рекомендую взять с собой достаточно мощные {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}люмены{/g}, Ваша Светлость. Боюсь, уровень инсоляции на поверхности вряд ли вас удовлетворит".

languages.text: "My laboratory. Well, former laboratory, to be precise. According to the coordinates, it is on the dark side of the planet, in the fifth segment of the northern hemisphere." {n}Each word the Manipulus utters is precisely enunciated to the point of lifelessness. His speech, usually rich in nuance, seems drained of all colour.{/n} "I recommend that you bring sufficiently powerful {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} with you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I fear the level of insolation on the surface is unlikely to satisfy you."
languages.original_text: "Мою лабораторию. Точнее, уже бывшую лабораторию. Согласно координатам, она находится на темной стороне планеты, в пятом сегменте северного полушария". {n}Манипулус произносит каждое слово до безжизненности выверенно. Боюсь, уровень инсоляции на поверхности вряд ли вас удовлетворит".

His speech, usually rich in nuance, seems drained of all colour.{/n} "I recommend that you bring sufficiently powerful lumens with you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I fear the level of insolation on the surface is unlikely to satisfy you."

languages.text: “我的实验室。确切地说，是曾经的实验室。根据坐标，它位于行星的暗面，北半球第五扇区。”{n}操纵者吐出的每个字精准而机械，几乎毫无生气。平日里丰富而微妙的言辞，此刻却仿佛褪去了所有色彩。{/n}“大人，我建议您携带强力{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}照明{/g}设备。我担心地表的日照强度恐怕难以满足您的需求。”
languages.original_text: "My laboratory. Well, former laboratory, to be precise. According to the coordinates, it is on the dark side of the planet, in the fifth segment of the northern hemisphere." {n}Each word the Manipulus utters is precisely enunciated to the point of lifelessness. His speech, usually rich in nuance, seems drained of all colour.{/n} "I recommend that you bring sufficiently powerful {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} with you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I fear the level of insolation on the surface is unlikely to satisfy you."

traits.locale_text: “我的实验室。确切地说，是曾经的实验室。根据坐标，它位于行星的暗面，北半球第五扇区。”{n}操纵者吐出的每个字精准而机械，几乎毫无生气。平日里丰富而微妙的言辞，此刻却仿佛褪去了所有色彩。{/n}“大人，我建议您携带强力{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}照明{/g}设备。我担心地表的日照强度恐怕难以满足您的需求。”

languages.text: «Mi laboratorio. Bueno, mi antiguo laboratorio, para ser exactos. Según las coordenadas, se encuentra en el lado oscuro del planeta, en el quinto segmento del hemisferio norte». {n}La voz del manipulus ha perdido toda emoción y matices, pronunciándolo todo con una precisión propia de los muertos.{/n} «Le recomiendo que traiga {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g} potentes, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Me temo que el nivel de iluminación en la superficie no será de su agrado».
languages.original_text: "My laboratory. Well, former laboratory, to be precise. According to the coordinates, it is on the dark side of the planet, in the fifth segment of the northern hemisphere." {n}Each word the Manipulus utters is precisely enunciated to the point of lifelessness. His speech, usually rich in nuance, seems drained of all colour.{/n} "I recommend that you bring sufficiently powerful {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} with you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I fear the level of insolation on the surface is unlikely to satisfy you."

traits.locale_text: «Mi laboratorio. Bueno, mi antiguo laboratorio, para ser exactos. Según las coordenadas, se encuentra en el lado oscuro del planeta, en el quinto segmento del hemisferio norte». {n}La voz del manipulus ha perdido toda emoción y matices, pronunciándolo todo con una precisión propia de los muertos.{/n} «Le recomiendo que traiga {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g} potentes, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Me temo que el nivel de iluminación en la superficie no será de su agrado».

languages.text: « Mon laboratoire. Enfin, mon ancien laboratoire. D'après les coordonnées, il se trouve sur le côté sombre de la planète, dans le cinquième segment de l'hémisphère nord. » {n}Chaque mot que prononce le manipulus est articulé avec la plus grande précision, jusqu'à paraître dénué de toute vie. Son discours, généralement riche en nuances, n'a plus la moindre couleur.{/n} « Je vous recommande d'emporter des {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} puissants, Votre Seigneurie. J'ai bien peur que l'ensoleillement limité de la surface ne soit pas à votre goût. »
languages.original_text: "My laboratory. Well, former laboratory, to be precise. According to the coordinates, it is on the dark side of the planet, in the fifth segment of the northern hemisphere." {n}Each word the Manipulus utters is precisely enunciated to the point of lifelessness. His speech, usually rich in nuance, seems drained of all colour.{/n} "I recommend that you bring sufficiently powerful {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} with you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I fear the level of insolation on the surface is unlikely to satisfy you."

traits.locale_text: « Mon laboratoire. Enfin, mon ancien laboratoire. D'après les coordonnées, il se trouve sur le côté sombre de la planète, dans le cinquième segment de l'hémisphère nord. » {n}Chaque mot que prononce le manipulus est articulé avec la plus grande précision, jusqu'à paraître dénué de toute vie. Son discours, généralement riche en nuances, n'a plus la moindre couleur.{/n} « Je vous recommande d'emporter des {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} puissants, Votre Seigneurie. J'ai bien peur que l'ensoleillement limité de la surface ne soit pas à votre goût. »

languages.text: "Laboratuvarımı. Daha doğrusu eski laboratuvar. Koordinatlara göre gezegenin karanlık tarafında, kuzey yarım kürenin beşinci segmentinde." {n}Manipülus'un sarf ettiği her kelime, cansızlık noktasına varacak kadar hassas bir şekilde telaffuz ediliyor. Genellikle nüans bakımından zengin olan konuşmasının tüm rengi çekilmiş gibi.{/n} "Yanınızda yeterince güçlü {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lümenler{/g} getirmenizi tavsiye ederim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Korkarım yüzeydeki güneş ışınımı seviyesinin sizi tatmin etmesi pek olası değil."
languages.original_text: "My laboratory. Well, former laboratory, to be precise. According to the coordinates, it is on the dark side of the planet, in the fifth segment of the northern hemisphere." {n}Each word the Manipulus utters is precisely enunciated to the point of lifelessness. His speech, usually rich in nuance, seems drained of all colour.{/n} "I recommend that you bring sufficiently powerful {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} with you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I fear the level of insolation on the surface is unlikely to satisfy you."

traits.locale_text: "Laboratuvarımı. Daha doğrusu eski laboratuvar. Koordinatlara göre gezegenin karanlık tarafında, kuzey yarım kürenin beşinci segmentinde." {n}Manipülus'un sarf ettiği her kelime, cansızlık noktasına varacak kadar hassas bir şekilde telaffuz ediliyor. Genellikle nüans bakımından zengin olan konuşmasının tüm rengi çekilmiş gibi.{/n} "Yanınızda yeterince güçlü {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lümenler{/g} getirmenizi tavsiye ederim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Korkarım yüzeydeki güneş ışınımı seviyesinin sizi tatmin etmesi pek olası değil."

languages.text: "Mein Labor. Na ja, mein ehemaliges Labor, um genau zu sein. Den Koordinaten zufolge befindet es sich auf der dunklen Seite des Planeten im fünften Segment der nördlichen Hemisphäre." {n}Den Worten des Manipulus fehlt jede Lebendigkeit. Seine sonst so nuancierte Ausdrucksweise scheint ihre gesamte Farbe verloren zu haben.{/n} "Ich rate Euch, leistungsfähige {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumen{/g} mitzunehmen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich fürchte, die Sonneneinstrahlung auf der Oberflache wird Euch nicht gefallen."

Ich fürchte, die Sonneneinstrahlung auf der Oberflache wird Euch nicht gefallen."

languages.text: 「私の研究室。正確には、旧研究室です。座標によると、そこは惑星の暗面、北半球の5区にあります。」{n}マニピュラスが口にする言葉は、生気のないほど正確に発音される。通常はニュアンスに富んだ彼の言葉は、色を失ったように思えた。{/n}「十分な{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}光量{/g}を携えておいでください、陛下。地表の太陽光は、御期待に沿うとは考えられません」
languages.original_text: "My laboratory. Well, former laboratory, to be precise. According to the coordinates, it is on the dark side of the planet, in the fifth segment of the northern hemisphere." {n}Each word the Manipulus utters is precisely enunciated to the point of lifelessness. His speech, usually rich in nuance, seems drained of all colour.{/n} "I recommend that you bring sufficiently powerful {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} with you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I fear the level of insolation on the surface is unlikely to satisfy you."

traits.locale_text: 「私の研究室。正確には、旧研究室です。座標によると、そこは惑星の暗面、北半球の5区にあります。」{n}マニピュラスが口にする言葉は、生気のないほど正確に発音される。通常はニュアンスに富んだ彼の言葉は、色を失ったように思えた。{n}「十分な光量を携えておいでください、御{mf|殿|女}様。地表の太陽光は、御期待に沿うとは考えられません。」
「私の研究室。正確には、旧研究室です。座標によると、そこは惑星の暗面、北半球の5区にあります。」{n}マニピュラスが口にする言葉は、生気のないほど正確に発音される。通常はニュアンスに富んだ彼の言葉は、色を失ったように思えた。{/n}「十分な{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}光量{/g}を携えておいでください、陛下。地表の太陽光は、御期待に沿うとは考えられません」
